fact: Bobsec (punkproof.com) explicitly states on its homepage: 'we do not allow sending messages to the internet' — confirming it operates as an inbound-only / walled-garden email service.

Bobsec (punkproof.com) explicitly requests on their live homepage: 'We kindly request that our domain names not be blocked, as we are not a throwaway email service and our emails will not bounce. In the event that you encounter difficulties with user registrations, please consider banning them by IP address instead.'
